idea-plugin.name: Dependency Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Provides assisted upgrading of Maven and Gradle dependencies in your IDE. The plugin highlights dependency declarations for newer versions and offers a controlled path to apply updates without replacing your own judgment about when to upgrade.

The support includes:
  • Scanning of pom.xml (Maven) and build.gradle(.kts), gradle.properties, settings.gradle(.kts), and gradle/libs.versions.toml (Gradle)
  • Determining version update candidates against remote Maven repositories
  • Selection of dependencies and plugins to update
  • Supports Maven Central and custom repositories

Maven

  • Open pom.xml in the editor.
  • Use the intention action (light bulb) on a dependency or plugin version to check for updates.
  • Or use the menu action Tools | Update Maven Plugins and Dependencies.

Gradle

  • Open a Gradle build file (build.gradle, build.gradle.kts, gradle.properties, or libs.versions.toml) in the editor.
  • Use the intention action (light bulb) to check for updates.
  • Or use Tools | Update Gradle Dependencies.

Source and issues: mp911de/dependency-assistant
